title: One Click NameMc
description: Click a button to open players NameMc!
body:
One Click NameMC is a simple quality-of-life mod that lets you instantly open a player’s NameMC profile with a single key press. When you press the keybind (default N, fully configurable), the mod detects the player you are currently looking at and automatically opens their NameMC page in your browser.

No typing usernames, no copy-pasting, no tabbing around. Just look at a player, press the key, and their NameMC profile opens instantly. Perfect for quickly checking skins, name history, or account details while in-game.
